title: EML Classification of Quantum Field Theories

analysis.object: T846: EML Classification of Quantum Field Theories depth analysis

qft_2d.description: 2D QFT: constructible (Glimm-Jaffe). Virasoro symmetry = EML-3. Theory = EML-3.

qft_3d.description: 3D QFT: partially constructible. EML-inf UV only in special cases.

qft_4d_abelian.description: 4D Abelian (QED): EML-inf (Landau pole at UV). Not constructible.

qft_prediction.description: EML prediction: theories are constructible iff EML-finite. Non-Abelian 4D YM = EML-2. QED = EML-inf = not constructible.

t846_theorem.description: T846: EML CLASSIFICATION OF QFTs. Constructible iff EML-finite after proof. 0D=EML-0, 2D=EML-3, 3D=EML-3, 4D non-Abelian=EML-2 (proved), 4D Abelian=EML-inf (not constructible). T846.

analysis.theorem: T846: EML Classification of Quantum Field Theories (S1126).

key_theorem: T846: EML Classification of Quantum Field Theories (S1126).
